title: Urubuga rwa IATF
summary: Urubuga rusange rwa International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF yari ikeneye inzu rusange ihamye isobanura icyitegererezo, igatanga urutonde rw'imishinga, kandi ikereka abaterankunga intambwe ikurikira ikwiriye.
why: Urubuga ni umuryango rusange wa IATF. Yubatswe nkumushinga muto uhagaze kuburyo byoroshye gusoma, guhindura, no kubungabunga ahantu hizewe.
scopeIn: Imbuga rusange zisobanura imiterere ya IATF
Ibaruramari rusange ry'imishinga ya IATF yemewe, ikora, kandi yashyizwe mu bubiko hamwe n'imiterere, ushinzwe kubungabunga, ububiko, na demo
Inkomoko y'icyongereza ifite imiterere yiteguye guhindurwa
Gushyiraho Static kuri Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Ibice by'abanyamuryango ku giti cyabo, konti, cyangwa imiyoboro yo kwinjira
Kubika kodegisi y'umushinga, iba mububiko bwa buri mushinga bwite
Ikiganiro cyo mu gihe nyacyo, kibaho muri Discord
Kurikirana ikibazo cya buri mushinga, uba mu bubiko bwa buri mushinga wa GitHub

title: Igishushanyo cya IATF
summary: Igishushanyo mbonera cya IATF cya mbere, cyashyizwe mu bubiko nyuma yo kugera ahantu nyaburanga ho guhagarara.
problem: Gushakisha hakiri kare igikoresho cyibanze ku bwisanzure munsi y'igicucu cya IATF.
why: Ububiko bubitswe ku mugaragaro nk'inyandiko y'akazi, nubwo iterambere rikomeye ryahagaze.
scopeIn: Igishushanyo mbonera cya mbere cy'igikoresho cyibanda ku buryo bworoshye bwo kugera ku bantu, kibikwa nk'inyandiko rusange
scopeOut: Uburyo bw'imikoreshereze mu ikorwa ry'ibikomoka kuri peteroli

title: Ikigo cy'Igihugu gishinzwe ibijyanye n'ingengo y'imari (IATF)
summary: Bot y'umuryango wa IATF, yashyizwe mu bubiko nyuma yo kugera ahantu nyaburanga ho guhagarara.
problem: Imikorere yihariye ijyanye n'imiyoboro y'umuryango wa IATF.
why: Ububiko bubitswe ku mugaragaro nk'inyandiko y'akazi, nubwo iterambere rikomeye ryahagaze.
scopeIn: Imirimo yo gutangiza amakimbirane ku miyoboro y'umuryango wa IATF, ibikwa nk'inyandiko rusange
scopeOut: Uburyo bw'imikoreshereze mu ikorwa ry'ibikomoka kuri peteroli
